TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Kakacawan, title = Kakacawan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kakacawan} }

S.FORM: == Kakacawan == O itiraay i saka'amis no sawalian no Posong-kowan, o lalengawan no Kakacawan-ponka konini. I saka'amis madado'edo ato Fakong, misi'ayaway to kawali to Tayping-yang riyar, i sa'etipan o Posko ato Kongpo(Foli), i sakatimol o Madawdaw, micingray to lotok a misi'ayaw to riyar. O faco no sera masahefohefongay, kakaya' ko lilis no riyar, o Fa'edetay-kakarayan. O maro'ay tamdaw o 'Amis ko sakakaay ira ho ko Ponong Finacadan(Iwatan), ira ho kona Kaliyawan a finacadan(平埔族群: Pepohoan) Makataw finacadan ato Tawlong finacadan(大武壠族:Taivoan)ano ca o 大滿族 hananay a mitahidang),ira ho ko Payrang. O saka'orip o maomahay ato mifotingay, o niyaro'ay sowal ono 'Amis a sowal. Rikisi O katelangay ho a pipangangan o "Kakacawan" , ira ho ko toloay roma a pangangan: Sakacecay: o nani sowal no 'Amis to "Pikacawan" a ngiha' koni alaan, o "pikecoran a minengneng" sanay ko tatodong no nini sowal, itini a mahapinang i kakaleponan no pikowan no Mancing , nika 'aloman ta to ko mafolaway a tayni no roma a finacadan(o Silaya, Kafalan...) masamacekil ko fodfod ato itinitiniay ko kahalafing ko aro' a 'Amis tamdaw,i 1877 miheca malalood ko 'Amis a tamdaw ato sofitay no Mancin i Cepo' , orasaka, patireng ko 'Amis a tamdaw to pikacawan, miocor to kapah a mitapal a mikacaw. Sakatosa: o sowal no Kaliyawan a finacadan, o pi'adopan no 'Amis a tamdaw kona itiniay pala, adihay ko mitatingay a ni'adopan, sa adihay ko 'atimela miketing saan, sano Payrangen ko 'atimela a ngiha' "kacaw" sanay, orasaka niala to ngiha' no Payrang tira "kacaw" ko ao ngangan, i Kuwangsi-honti no Mancin a mihecahecaan(1875年—1908) sa'aloman sanay to ko Payrang a tayni. Sakatolo: itiya ho o mafolaway a tayni i, sahetoay o nani tiraay i Pintong a Makataw-finacadan, o kamaro'an nangra i iraay ko cinganganay to " kakacawan-lotok" ira heca ko "kakacawan-niyaro' " o mafolaway a tayni a tamdaw o sa'ayaway cangra tayni a maomah, latek itiraay ho i 1859 mihecaan, ma'ilolen cangra to kasofocan a niyaro' toya kakacawan, orasaka pangangan han "kakacawan", onini a pangangan ko hato so'elinay saan ko sowal. I kadiponan to i, ono Posong-kowan konini, nipatirengay to "kakacawan-niyaro' ", i syowa 12 miheca(昭和12年, 1937 年) o kaleponan tono pikowan no Dipon, o Sakakaay mikowanay Taywan-Sotokfo micikeroh to "maladipon-tamdaw sanay a demak" . O lislis no riyar no Kakacawan ira ko 28 km ko kakaya', falic han no Dipon to "Cangpin" , patireng heca to "Kakacawan-etal", mipecihan patayra i Singko-kowan, itini tona kowan a niyaro' ira ko Kakacawan, Salinpo, Censan, Sifo'ay, Sankinya, Makerahay ato Koladot pito ko Tata'angay-tilid, ikor tono Sakatosa-Lalood mapatireng to Kakacawan-etal no Posong-kowan tahanini, ira ko Ciwkangan, Tapowaray, Kinanoka, Pasongan, Cidatayay, Ta'eman, Carapongay, Koladot, Polot, Sadipongan, Makerahay/Saranawan, Cikadaan, Nadan, Morenos, Pakara'ac ko niyaro'. Kaitiraan O Kakacawan itiraay i sifo'an no lislis no riyar no sawalian no Kalinko ato Posong, o isaka'amisan a etal no Posong kowan, isaka'amisan malafiyaway ato Fakong etal no Kalinko, isakatimolan madado'edoay ato Madawdaw, misi'ayaway to Taypin-yang riyar, isak'etipan malala'ed to Lilisay no Riyar Lotok ato Posko ato Kongpo etal no Kalinko. O kakahad no sera ira 155.1868 km2, mahaop ko 4.41% a sera no polong no Posong, o nikowanan a pala nani'amis tala timol masaco'ecoay a to'edaw, ira ko 28 km, o kakahad nani kawali tayra i ka'etip latek ira ko 8 km. O kayakay no Koradot itiraay i Cifotingan-'Alo, ono kadipongan a misanga'an (1937 miheca ) ato misanga'an i 1986 miheca ato 1998 miheca matata'edipay nengengen. Tamdaw 'Arawen ko pisa'osi no kosika no Singko, i 2022 mihecaan a parod no Kakacawan ira k 2 ofad 9 patek, o masa'osiay tamdaw i ira ko 6 'ofad 7 patek ko tamdaw no Kakacawan,o sakakaay ko kaadihay no tamdaw o Kakacawan niyaro', o sasafaay ko tamdaw o Dita'an niyaro' , i 2022 mihecaan a sa'osi notamdaw o Kakacawan ira ko 2,141 tamdaw, o Dita'an ira ko 573 ko tamdaw. Sieci Faco no sieci O kofa no Kakacawan ko sakakaay a citodongay to demak no polong no Kakacawan, pakitinien i faco no Conghuwa-minko ono etal a niyah pikowan a citodongay sakowan, patokeded han o matayal to nipatorodan no Poson-kowan ato no Sakakaay -Sifo, o mitomadaway a skowan o Kinsifo no Posong. O tapang no kofa o nisinkiwan no polong a finawlan no Kakacawan, sepat miheca ko katayalan, manga'ay to a paradid ano pakaala to sinkiw to kinacecay.o kofa mipatireng to sakadademak a kayki, o sakakaay misetekay to hadademaken a sakowan, i la'eno no tapang no kofa ira ko sepat a ka ato si, polongen pito ko cotodongay to hatayal.O kalomaocan no taypiyaw no Kakacaw o sakakaay nisafaloco'ay-sakowan no finawlan,mapaocor ko taypiyaw misanga' to rikec ato mitomadaw to tayal no kofa. Sepat miheca ko katayalan no taypiyaw, manga'ay a pararid ano pakaala to sinkiw. Opolong no taypiyaw patipoay ko tamdaw, o sakilac i, itiraay i sakatolo a etal pisinkiwan tatolo ko taypiyaw, i sakatosa etal a pisinkiwan sasepat ko taypiyaw,i sakatosa etal a pisinkiwan a Dafdafay Yincumin ira ko sasepat, o kakeridan ato sadama kakeridan no pikaykian no taypiyaw ona patitoay taypiyaw ko alamitopaay misinkiw. o tapang no kofa Sakilac no Etal : 1.Koradot niyaro' : itiraay i lawac no Cifotingay 'alo ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Tahonghong niyaro' ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Koladot niyaro' ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Ka'asimsan -'alo ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Mamangay Ciyai 2.Sadipongan : itiraay i lawac no Sadipongan 'alo ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Cifotingay /Roham ) ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Tapowaray niyaro' ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Cikadaan/Nadan ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Sadipongan niyaro' ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Makerahay niyaro' 3. Kakacawac niyaro' : o kaitiraan no kofa,i cepo' no Kakacawan-'alo ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Cencipo ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Ciwkangan ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Kakacawan ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Takumi 4.Dita'an niyaro' : itiraay i fafaw no Kakacawan-'alo ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Congcoang ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Ditaan ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Fafa'eday Takumi 5.Pakala'ac :itiraay i lawac no Pakala'ac-'alo ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Mornos ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Pakara'ac ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Satimolan Pakara'ac 6.Salinpo niyaro' :itiraay i salawacan no Salinpo-'alo ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Censan ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Pasongan niyaro' ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Salinpo ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Kinanoka ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Ta'eman ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Calapongay Pitilidan Kocong : Posong kowan nipatirengan a Kocong no Kakacawan( Maemangay pitilidan: Posong kowan nipatirengan a Koradot Pitilidan Posong kowan nipatirengan a Sadipongan Pitilidan Posong kowan nipatirengan a Kakacawan Pitilidan Posong kowan nipatirengan a Dita'an Pitilidan (mapalasawad i 2013 miheca ) Posong kowan nipatirengan a Pakara'ac Pitilidan Posong kowan nipatirengan a Salinpo Pitilidan 'Ariri no tilid Posong kowan Kakacawan Etal 'Ariri no tilid. kakacawan ira ko roma a sowal, o kakacawan ko pinengnengan to milo'oday a tamdaw. == Pacefaday a tilid ==
S.PHON: == kakaʦawan == o~u itiraaj i sakaʡamis no~u sawaɾian no~u po~uso~uŋ-ko~uwan, o~u ɾaɾəŋawan no~u kakaʦawan-po~unka ko~unini. i sakaʡamis maɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~u ato~u fako~uŋ, misiʡajawaj to~u kawaɾi to~u tajpiŋ-jaŋ rijar, i saʡətipan o~u po~usko~u ato~u ko~uŋpo~u(fo~uɾi), i sakatimo~uɾ o~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw, miʦiŋraj to~u ɾo~uto~uk a misiʡajaw to~u rijar. o~u faʦo~u no~u səra masaħəfo~uħəfo~uŋaj, kakajaʡ ko~u ɾiɾis no~u rijar, o~u faʡəɬ~ɮətaj-kakarajan. o~u maro~uʡaj tamɬ~ɮaw o~u ʡamis ko~u sakakaaj ira ħo~u ko~u po~uno~uŋ finaʦaɬ~ɮan(iwatan), ira ħo~u ko~una kaɾijawan a finaʦaɬ~ɮan(****: pəpo~uħo~uan) makataw finaʦaɬ~ɮan ato~u tawɾo~uŋ finaʦaɬ~ɮan(****:taib~vo~uan)ano~u ʦa o~u *** ħananaj a mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ),ira ħo~u ko~u pajraŋ. o~u sakaʡo~urip o~u mao~umaħaj ato~u mifo~utiŋaj, o~u nijaro~uʡaj so~uwaɾ o~uno~u ʡamis a so~uwaɾ. rikisi o~u katəɾaŋaj ħo~u a pipaŋaŋan o~u "kakaʦawan" , ira ħo~u ko~u to~uɾo~uaj ro~uma a paŋaŋan: sakaʦəʦaj: o~u nani so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis to~u "pikaʦawan" a ŋiħaʡ ko~uni aɾaan, o~u "pikəʦo~uran a minəŋnəŋ" sanaj ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u nini so~uwaɾ, itini a maħapinaŋ i kakaɾəpo~unan no~u piko~uwan no~u manʦiŋ , nika ʡaɾo~uman ta to~u ko~u mafo~uɾawaj a tajni no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan(o~u siɾaja, kafaɾan...) masamaʦəkiɾ ko~u fo~uɬ~ɮfo~uɬ~ɮ ato~u itinitiniaj ko~u kaħaɾafiŋ ko~u aro~uʡ a ʡamis tamɬ~ɮaw,i **** miħəʦa maɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin i ʦəpo~uʡ , o~urasaka, patirəŋ ko~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw to~u pikaʦawan, mio~uʦo~ur to~u kapaħ a mitapaɾ a mikaʦaw. sakato~usa: o~u so~uwaɾ no~u kaɾijawan a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, o~u piʡaɬ~ɮo~upan no~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~una itiniaj paɾa, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u mitatiŋaj a niʡaɬ~ɮo~upan, sa aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u ʡatiməɾa mikətiŋ saan, sano~u pajraŋən ko~u ʡatiməɾa a ŋiħaʡ "kaʦaw" sanaj, o~urasaka niaɾa to~u ŋiħaʡ no~u pajraŋ tira "kaʦaw" ko~u ao~u ŋaŋan, i ko~u~uwaŋsi-ħo~unti no~u manʦin a miħəʦaħəʦaan(**********) saʡaɾo~uman sanaj to~u ko~u pajraŋ a tajni. sakato~uɾo~u: itija ħo~u o~u mafo~uɾawaj a tajni i, saħəto~uaj o~u nani tiraaj i pinto~uŋ a makataw-finaʦaɬ~ɮan, o~u kamaro~uʡan naŋra i iraaj ko~u ʦiŋaŋanaj to~u " kakaʦawan-ɾo~uto~uk" ira ħəʦa ko~u "kakaʦawan-nijaro~uʡ " o~u mafo~uɾawaj a tajni a tamɬ~ɮaw o~u saʡajawaj ʦaŋra tajni a mao~umaħ, ɾatək itiraaj ħo~u i **** miħəʦaan, maʡiɾo~uɾən ʦaŋra to~u kaso~ufo~uʦan a nijaro~uʡ to~uja kakaʦawan, o~urasaka paŋaŋan ħan "kakaʦawan", o~unini a paŋaŋan ko~u ħato~u so~uʡəɾinaj saan ko~u so~uwaɾ. i kaɬ~ɮipo~unan to~u i, o~uno~u po~uso~uŋ-ko~uwan ko~unini, nipatirəŋaj to~u "kakaʦawan-nijaro~uʡ ", i sjo~uwa ** miħəʦa(*****, **** *) o~u kaɾəpo~unan to~uno~u piko~uwan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un, o~u sakakaaj miko~uwanaj tajwan-so~uto~ukfo~u miʦikəro~uħ to~u "maɾaɬ~ɮipo~un-tamɬ~ɮaw sanaj a ɬ~ɮəmak" . o~u ɾisɾis no~u rijar no~u kakaʦawan ira ko~u ** km ko~u kakajaʡ, faɾiʦ ħan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un to~u "ʦaŋpin" , patirəŋ ħəʦa to~u "kakaʦawan-ətaɾ", mipəʦiħan patajra i siŋko~u-ko~uwan, itini to~una ko~uwan a nijaro~uʡ ira ko~u kakaʦawan, saɾinpo~u, ʦənsan, sifo~uʡaj, sankinja, makəraħaj ato~u ko~uɾaɬ~ɮo~ut pito~u ko~u tataʡaŋaj-tiɾiɬ~ɮ, iko~ur to~uno~u sakato~usa-ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ mapatirəŋ to~u kakaʦawan-ətaɾ no~u po~uso~uŋ-ko~uwan taħanini, ira ko~u ʦiwkaŋan, tapo~uwaraj, kinano~uka, paso~uŋan, ʦiɬ~ɮatajaj, taʡəman, ʦarapo~uŋaj, ko~uɾaɬ~ɮo~ut, po~uɾo~ut, saɬ~ɮipo~uŋan, makəraħaj/saranawan, ʦikaɬ~ɮaan, naɬ~ɮan, mo~urəno~us, pakaraʡaʦ ko~u nijaro~uʡ. kaitiraan o~u kakaʦawan itiraaj i sifo~uʡan no~u ɾisɾis no~u rijar no~u sawaɾian no~u kaɾinko~u ato~u po~uso~uŋ, o~u isakaʡamisan a ətaɾ no~u po~uso~uŋ ko~uwan, isakaʡamisan maɾafijawaj ato~u fako~uŋ ətaɾ no~u kaɾinko~u, isakatimo~uɾan maɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~uaj ato~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw, misiʡajawaj to~u tajpin-jaŋ rijar, isakʡətipan maɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮ to~u ɾiɾisaj no~u rijar ɾo~uto~uk ato~u po~usko~u ato~u ko~uŋpo~u ətaɾ no~u kaɾinko~u. o~u kakaħaɬ~ɮ no~u səra ira ***.**** km*, maħao~up ko~u *.**% a səra no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u po~uso~uŋ, o~u niko~uwanan a paɾa naniʡamis taɾa timo~uɾ masaʦo~uʡəʦo~uaj a to~uʡəɬ~ɮaw, ira ko~u ** km, o~u kakaħaɬ~ɮ nani kawaɾi tajra i kaʡətip ɾatək ira ko~u * km. o~u kajakaj no~u ko~uraɬ~ɮo~ut itiraaj i ʦifo~utiŋan-ʡaɾo~u, o~uno~u kaɬ~ɮipo~uŋan a misaŋaʡan (**** miħəʦa ) ato~u misaŋaʡan i **** miħəʦa ato~u **** miħəʦa matataʡəɬ~ɮipaj nəŋəŋən. tamɬ~ɮaw ʡarawən ko~u pisaʡo~usi no~u ko~usika no~u siŋko~u, i **** miħəʦaan a paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u kakaʦawan ira k * o~ufaɬ~ɮ * patək, o~u masaʡo~usiaj tamɬ~ɮaw i ira ko~u * ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ * patək ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kakaʦawan,o~u sakakaaj ko~u kaaɬ~ɮiħaj no~u tamɬ~ɮaw o~u kakaʦawan nijaro~uʡ, o~u sasafaaj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw o~u ɬ~ɮitaʡan nijaro~uʡ , i **** miħəʦaan a saʡo~usi no~utamɬ~ɮaw o~u kakaʦawan ira ko~u *,*** tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u ɬ~ɮitaʡan ira ko~u *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. siəʦi faʦo~u no~u siəʦi o~u ko~ufa no~u kakaʦawan ko~u sakakaaj a ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kakaʦawan, pakitiniən i faʦo~u no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uwa-minko~u o~uno~u ətaɾ a nijaħ piko~uwan a ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj sako~uwan, pato~ukəɬ~ɮəɬ~ɮ ħan o~u matajaɾ to~u nipato~uro~uɬ~ɮan no~u po~uso~un-ko~uwan ato~u no~u sakakaaj -sifo~u, o~u mito~umaɬ~ɮawaj a sko~uwan o~u kinsifo~u no~u po~uso~uŋ. o~u tapaŋ no~u ko~ufa o~u nisinkiwan no~u po~uɾo~uŋ a finawɾan no~u kakaʦawan, səpat miħəʦa ko~u katajaɾan, maŋaʡaj to~u a paraɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮ ano~u pakaaɾa to~u sinkiw to~u kinaʦəʦaj.o~u ko~ufa mipatirəŋ to~u sakaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak a kajki, o~u sakakaaj misətəkaj to~u ħaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən a sako~uwan, i ɾaʡəno~u no~u tapaŋ no~u ko~ufa ira ko~u səpat a ka ato~u si, po~uɾo~uŋən pito~u ko~u ʦo~uto~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u ħatajaɾ.o~u kaɾo~umao~uʦan no~u tajpijaw no~u kakaʦaw o~u sakakaaj nisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡaj-sako~uwan no~u finawɾan,mapao~uʦo~ur ko~u tajpijaw misaŋaʡ to~u rikəʦ ato~u mito~umaɬ~ɮaw to~u tajaɾ no~u ko~ufa. səpat miħəʦa ko~u katajaɾan no~u tajpijaw, maŋaʡaj a parariɬ~ɮ ano~u pakaaɾa to~u sinkiw. o~upo~uɾo~uŋ no~u tajpijaw patipo~uaj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u sakiɾaʦ i, itiraaj i sakato~uɾo~u a ətaɾ pisinkiwan tato~uɾo~u ko~u tajpijaw, i sakato~usa ətaɾ a pisinkiwan sasəpat ko~u tajpijaw,i sakato~usa ətaɾ a pisinkiwan a ɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮafaj jinʦo~u~umin ira ko~u sasəpat, o~u kakəriɬ~ɮan ato~u saɬ~ɮama kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u pikajkian no~u tajpijaw o~una patito~uaj tajpijaw ko~u aɾamito~upaaj misinkiw. o~u tapaŋ no~u ko~ufa sakiɾaʦ no~u ətaɾ : *.ko~uraɬ~ɮo~ut nijaro~uʡ : itiraaj i ɾawaʦ no~u ʦifo~utiŋaj ʡaɾo~u * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } taħo~uŋħo~uŋ nijaro~uʡ * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } ko~uɾaɬ~ɮo~ut nijaro~uʡ * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } kaʡasimsan -ʡaɾo~u * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } mamaŋaj ʦijai *.saɬ~ɮipo~uŋan : itiraaj i ɾawaʦ no~u saɬ~ɮipo~uŋan ʡaɾo~u * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } ʦifo~utiŋaj /ro~uħam ) * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } tapo~uwaraj nijaro~uʡ * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } ʦikaɬ~ɮaan/naɬ~ɮan * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } saɬ~ɮipo~uŋan nijaro~uʡ * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } makəraħaj nijaro~uʡ *. kakaʦawaʦ nijaro~uʡ : o~u kaitiraan no~u ko~ufa,i ʦəpo~uʡ no~u kakaʦawan-ʡaɾo~u * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } ʦənʦipo~u * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } ʦiwkaŋan * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } kakaʦawan * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } tako~u~umi *.ɬ~ɮitaʡan nijaro~uʡ : itiraaj i fafaw no~u kakaʦawan-ʡaɾo~u * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } ʦo~uŋʦo~uaŋ * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } ɬ~ɮitaan * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } fafaʡəɬ~ɮaj tako~u~umi *.pakaɾaʡaʦ :itiraaj i ɾawaʦ no~u pakaɾaʡaʦ-ʡaɾo~u * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } mo~urno~us * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } pakaraʡaʦ * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } satimo~uɾan pakaraʡaʦ *.saɾinpo~u nijaro~uʡ :itiraaj i saɾawaʦan no~u saɾinpo~u-ʡaɾo~u * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } ʦənsan * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } paso~uŋan nijaro~uʡ * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } saɾinpo~u * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } kinano~uka * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } taʡəman * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } ʦaɾapo~uŋaj pitiɾiɬ~ɮan ko~uʦo~uŋ : po~uso~uŋ ko~uwan nipatirəŋan a ko~uʦo~uŋ no~u kakaʦawan( maəmaŋaj pitiɾiɬ~ɮan: po~uso~uŋ ko~uwan nipatirəŋan a ko~uraɬ~ɮo~ut pitiɾiɬ~ɮan po~uso~uŋ ko~uwan nipatirəŋan a saɬ~ɮipo~uŋan pitiɾiɬ~ɮan po~uso~uŋ ko~uwan nipatirəŋan a kakaʦawan pitiɾiɬ~ɮan po~uso~uŋ ko~uwan nipatirəŋan a ɬ~ɮitaʡan pitiɾiɬ~ɮan (mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ i **** miħəʦa ) po~uso~uŋ ko~uwan nipatirəŋan a pakaraʡaʦ pitiɾiɬ~ɮan po~uso~uŋ ko~uwan nipatirəŋan a saɾinpo~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan ʡariri no~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ po~uso~uŋ ko~uwan kakaʦawan ətaɾ ʡariri no~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ. kakaʦawan ira ko~u ro~uma a so~uwaɾ, o~u kakaʦawan ko~u pinəŋnəŋan to~u miɾo~uʡo~uɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. == paʦəfaɬ~ɮaj a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ==
S.FORM: == Kakacawan == O itiraay i saka'amis no sawalian no Posong-kowan, o lalengawan no Kakacawan-ponka konini. I saka'amis madado'edo ato Fakong, misi'ayaway to kawali to Tayping-yang riyar, i sa'etipan o Posko ato Kongpo(Foli), i sakatimol o Madawdaw, micingray to lotok a misi'ayaw to riyar. O faco no sera masahefohefongay, kakaya' ko lilis no riyar, o Fa'edetay-kakarayan. O maro'ay tamdaw o 'Amis ko sakakaay ira ho ko Ponong Finacadan(Iwatan), ira ho kona Kaliyawan a finacadan(平埔族群: Pepohoan) Makataw finacadan ato Tawlong finacadan(大武壠族:Taivoan)ano ca o 大滿族 hananay a mitahidang),ira ho ko Payrang. O saka'orip o maomahay ato mifotingay, o niyaro'ay sowal ono 'Amis a sowal. Rikisi O katelangay ho a pipangangan o "Kakacawan" , ira ho ko toloay roma a pangangan: Sakacecay: o nani sowal no 'Amis to "Pikacawan" a ngiha' koni alaan, o "pikecoran a minengneng" sanay ko tatodong no nini sowal, itini a mahapinang i kakaleponan no pikowan no Mancing , nika 'aloman ta to ko mafolaway a tayni no roma a finacadan(o Silaya, Kafalan...) masamacekil ko fodfod ato itinitiniay ko kahalafing ko aro' a 'Amis tamdaw,i 1877 miheca malalood ko 'Amis a tamdaw ato sofitay no Mancin i Cepo' , orasaka, patireng ko 'Amis a tamdaw to pikacawan, miocor to kapah a mitapal a mikacaw. Sakatosa: o sowal no Kaliyawan a finacadan, o pi'adopan no 'Amis a tamdaw kona itiniay pala, adihay ko mitatingay a ni'adopan, sa adihay ko 'atimela miketing saan, sano Payrangen ko 'atimela a ngiha' "kacaw" sanay, orasaka niala to ngiha' no Payrang tira "kacaw" ko ao ngangan, i Kuwangsi-honti no Mancin a mihecahecaan(1875年—1908) sa'aloman sanay to ko Payrang a tayni. Sakatolo: itiya ho o mafolaway a tayni i, sahetoay o nani tiraay i Pintong a Makataw-finacadan, o kamaro'an nangra i iraay ko cinganganay to " kakacawan-lotok" ira heca ko "kakacawan-niyaro' " o mafolaway a tayni a tamdaw o sa'ayaway cangra tayni a maomah, latek itiraay ho i 1859 mihecaan, ma'ilolen cangra to kasofocan a niyaro' toya kakacawan, orasaka pangangan han "kakacawan", onini a pangangan ko hato so'elinay saan ko sowal. I kadiponan to i, ono Posong-kowan konini, nipatirengay to "kakacawan-niyaro' ", i syowa 12 miheca(昭和12年, 1937 年) o kaleponan tono pikowan no Dipon, o Sakakaay mikowanay Taywan-Sotokfo micikeroh to "maladipon-tamdaw sanay a demak" . O lislis no riyar no Kakacawan ira ko 28 km ko kakaya', falic han no Dipon to "Cangpin" , patireng heca to "Kakacawan-etal", mipecihan patayra i Singko-kowan, itini tona kowan a niyaro' ira ko Kakacawan, Salinpo, Censan, Sifo'ay, Sankinya, Makerahay ato Koladot pito ko Tata'angay-tilid, ikor tono Sakatosa-Lalood mapatireng to Kakacawan-etal no Posong-kowan tahanini, ira ko Ciwkangan, Tapowaray, Kinanoka, Pasongan, Cidatayay, Ta'eman, Carapongay, Koladot, Polot, Sadipongan, Makerahay/Saranawan, Cikadaan, Nadan, Morenos, Pakara'ac ko niyaro'. Kaitiraan O Kakacawan itiraay i sifo'an no lislis no riyar no sawalian no Kalinko ato Posong, o isaka'amisan a etal no Posong kowan, isaka'amisan malafiyaway ato Fakong etal no Kalinko, isakatimolan madado'edoay ato Madawdaw, misi'ayaway to Taypin-yang riyar, isak'etipan malala'ed to Lilisay no Riyar Lotok ato Posko ato Kongpo etal no Kalinko. O kakahad no sera ira 155.1868 km2, mahaop ko 4.41% a sera no polong no Posong, o nikowanan a pala nani'amis tala timol masaco'ecoay a to'edaw, ira ko 28 km, o kakahad nani kawali tayra i ka'etip latek ira ko 8 km. O kayakay no Koradot itiraay i Cifotingan-'Alo, ono kadipongan a misanga'an (1937 miheca ) ato misanga'an i 1986 miheca ato 1998 miheca matata'edipay nengengen. Tamdaw 'Arawen ko pisa'osi no kosika no Singko, i 2022 mihecaan a parod no Kakacawan ira k 2 ofad 9 patek, o masa'osiay tamdaw i ira ko 6 'ofad 7 patek ko tamdaw no Kakacawan,o sakakaay ko kaadihay no tamdaw o Kakacawan niyaro', o sasafaay ko tamdaw o Dita'an niyaro' , i 2022 mihecaan a sa'osi notamdaw o Kakacawan ira ko 2,141 tamdaw, o Dita'an ira ko 573 ko tamdaw. Sieci Faco no sieci O kofa no Kakacawan ko sakakaay a citodongay to demak no polong no Kakacawan, pakitinien i faco no Conghuwa-minko ono etal a niyah pikowan a citodongay sakowan, patokeded han o matayal to nipatorodan no Poson-kowan ato no Sakakaay -Sifo, o mitomadaway a skowan o Kinsifo no Posong. O tapang no kofa o nisinkiwan no polong a finawlan no Kakacawan, sepat miheca ko katayalan, manga'ay to a paradid ano pakaala to sinkiw to kinacecay.o kofa mipatireng to sakadademak a kayki, o sakakaay misetekay to hadademaken a sakowan, i la'eno no tapang no kofa ira ko sepat a ka ato si, polongen pito ko cotodongay to hatayal.O kalomaocan no taypiyaw no Kakacaw o sakakaay nisafaloco'ay-sakowan no finawlan,mapaocor ko taypiyaw misanga' to rikec ato mitomadaw to tayal no kofa. Sepat miheca ko katayalan no taypiyaw, manga'ay a pararid ano pakaala to sinkiw. Opolong no taypiyaw patipoay ko tamdaw, o sakilac i, itiraay i sakatolo a etal pisinkiwan tatolo ko taypiyaw, i sakatosa etal a pisinkiwan sasepat ko taypiyaw,i sakatosa etal a pisinkiwan a Dafdafay Yincumin ira ko sasepat, o kakeridan ato sadama kakeridan no pikaykian no taypiyaw ona patitoay taypiyaw ko alamitopaay misinkiw. o tapang no kofa Sakilac no Etal : 1.Koradot niyaro' : itiraay i lawac no Cifotingay 'alo ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Tahonghong niyaro' ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Koladot niyaro' ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Ka'asimsan -'alo ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Mamangay Ciyai 2.Sadipongan : itiraay i lawac no Sadipongan 'alo ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Cifotingay /Roham ) ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Tapowaray niyaro' ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Cikadaan/Nadan ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Sadipongan niyaro' ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Makerahay niyaro' 3. Kakacawac niyaro' : o kaitiraan no kofa,i cepo' no Kakacawan-'alo ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Cencipo ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Ciwkangan ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Kakacawan ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Takumi 4.Dita'an niyaro' : itiraay i fafaw no Kakacawan-'alo ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Congcoang ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Ditaan ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Fafa'eday Takumi 5.Pakala'ac :itiraay i lawac no Pakala'ac-'alo ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Mornos ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Pakara'ac ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Satimolan Pakara'ac 6.Salinpo niyaro' :itiraay i salawacan no Salinpo-'alo ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Censan ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Pasongan niyaro' ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Salinpo ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Kinanoka ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Ta'eman ∙ {\displaystyle \bullet } Calapongay Pitilidan Kocong : Posong kowan nipatirengan a Kocong no Kakacawan( Maemangay pitilidan: Posong kowan nipatirengan a Koradot Pitilidan Posong kowan nipatirengan a Sadipongan Pitilidan Posong kowan nipatirengan a Kakacawan Pitilidan Posong kowan nipatirengan a Dita'an Pitilidan (mapalasawad i 2013 miheca ) Posong kowan nipatirengan a Pakara'ac Pitilidan Posong kowan nipatirengan a Salinpo Pitilidan 'Ariri no tilid Posong kowan Kakacawan Etal 'Ariri no tilid. kakacawan ira ko roma a sowal, o kakacawan ko pinengnengan to milo'oday a tamdaw. == Pacefaday a tilid ==
S.PHON: == kakaʦawan == o~u itiraaj i sakaʡamis no~u sawaɾian no~u po~uso~uŋ-ko~uwan, o~u ɾaɾəŋawan no~u kakaʦawan-po~unka ko~unini. i sakaʡamis maɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~u ato~u fako~uŋ, misiʡajawaj to~u kawaɾi to~u tajpiŋ-jaŋ rijar, i saʡətipan o~u po~usko~u ato~u ko~uŋpo~u(fo~uɾi), i sakatimo~uɾ o~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw, miʦiŋraj to~u ɾo~uto~uk a misiʡajaw to~u rijar. o~u faʦo~u no~u səra masaħəfo~uħəfo~uŋaj, kakajaʡ ko~u ɾiɾis no~u rijar, o~u faʡəɬ~ɮətaj-kakarajan. o~u maro~uʡaj tamɬ~ɮaw o~u ʡamis ko~u sakakaaj ira ħo~u ko~u po~uno~uŋ finaʦaɬ~ɮan(iwatan), ira ħo~u ko~una kaɾijawan a finaʦaɬ~ɮan(****: pəpo~uħo~uan) makataw finaʦaɬ~ɮan ato~u tawɾo~uŋ finaʦaɬ~ɮan(****:taib~vo~uan)ano~u ʦa o~u *** ħananaj a mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ),ira ħo~u ko~u pajraŋ. o~u sakaʡo~urip o~u mao~umaħaj ato~u mifo~utiŋaj, o~u nijaro~uʡaj so~uwaɾ o~uno~u ʡamis a so~uwaɾ. rikisi o~u katəɾaŋaj ħo~u a pipaŋaŋan o~u "kakaʦawan" , ira ħo~u ko~u to~uɾo~uaj ro~uma a paŋaŋan: sakaʦəʦaj: o~u nani so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis to~u "pikaʦawan" a ŋiħaʡ ko~uni aɾaan, o~u "pikəʦo~uran a minəŋnəŋ" sanaj ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u nini so~uwaɾ, itini a maħapinaŋ i kakaɾəpo~unan no~u piko~uwan no~u manʦiŋ , nika ʡaɾo~uman ta to~u ko~u mafo~uɾawaj a tajni no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan(o~u siɾaja, kafaɾan...) masamaʦəkiɾ ko~u fo~uɬ~ɮfo~uɬ~ɮ ato~u itinitiniaj ko~u kaħaɾafiŋ ko~u aro~uʡ a ʡamis tamɬ~ɮaw,i **** miħəʦa maɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin i ʦəpo~uʡ , o~urasaka, patirəŋ ko~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw to~u pikaʦawan, mio~uʦo~ur to~u kapaħ a mitapaɾ a mikaʦaw. sakato~usa: o~u so~uwaɾ no~u kaɾijawan a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, o~u piʡaɬ~ɮo~upan no~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~una itiniaj paɾa, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u mitatiŋaj a niʡaɬ~ɮo~upan, sa aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u ʡatiməɾa mikətiŋ saan, sano~u pajraŋən ko~u ʡatiməɾa a ŋiħaʡ "kaʦaw" sanaj, o~urasaka niaɾa to~u ŋiħaʡ no~u pajraŋ tira "kaʦaw" ko~u ao~u ŋaŋan, i ko~u~uwaŋsi-ħo~unti no~u manʦin a miħəʦaħəʦaan(**********) saʡaɾo~uman sanaj to~u ko~u pajraŋ a tajni. sakato~uɾo~u: itija ħo~u o~u mafo~uɾawaj a tajni i, saħəto~uaj o~u nani tiraaj i pinto~uŋ a makataw-finaʦaɬ~ɮan, o~u kamaro~uʡan naŋra i iraaj ko~u ʦiŋaŋanaj to~u " kakaʦawan-ɾo~uto~uk" ira ħəʦa ko~u "kakaʦawan-nijaro~uʡ " o~u mafo~uɾawaj a tajni a tamɬ~ɮaw o~u saʡajawaj ʦaŋra tajni a mao~umaħ, ɾatək itiraaj ħo~u i **** miħəʦaan, maʡiɾo~uɾən ʦaŋra to~u kaso~ufo~uʦan a nijaro~uʡ to~uja kakaʦawan, o~urasaka paŋaŋan ħan "kakaʦawan", o~unini a paŋaŋan ko~u ħato~u so~uʡəɾinaj saan ko~u so~uwaɾ. i kaɬ~ɮipo~unan to~u i, o~uno~u po~uso~uŋ-ko~uwan ko~unini, nipatirəŋaj to~u "kakaʦawan-nijaro~uʡ ", i sjo~uwa ** miħəʦa(*****, **** *) o~u kaɾəpo~unan to~uno~u piko~uwan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un, o~u sakakaaj miko~uwanaj tajwan-so~uto~ukfo~u miʦikəro~uħ to~u "maɾaɬ~ɮipo~un-tamɬ~ɮaw sanaj a ɬ~ɮəmak" . o~u ɾisɾis no~u rijar no~u kakaʦawan ira ko~u ** km ko~u kakajaʡ, faɾiʦ ħan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un to~u "ʦaŋpin" , patirəŋ ħəʦa to~u "kakaʦawan-ətaɾ", mipəʦiħan patajra i siŋko~u-ko~uwan, itini to~una ko~uwan a nijaro~uʡ ira ko~u kakaʦawan, saɾinpo~u, ʦənsan, sifo~uʡaj, sankinja, makəraħaj ato~u ko~uɾaɬ~ɮo~ut pito~u ko~u tataʡaŋaj-tiɾiɬ~ɮ, iko~ur to~uno~u sakato~usa-ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ mapatirəŋ to~u kakaʦawan-ətaɾ no~u po~uso~uŋ-ko~uwan taħanini, ira ko~u ʦiwkaŋan, tapo~uwaraj, kinano~uka, paso~uŋan, ʦiɬ~ɮatajaj, taʡəman, ʦarapo~uŋaj, ko~uɾaɬ~ɮo~ut, po~uɾo~ut, saɬ~ɮipo~uŋan, makəraħaj/saranawan, ʦikaɬ~ɮaan, naɬ~ɮan, mo~urəno~us, pakaraʡaʦ ko~u nijaro~uʡ. kaitiraan o~u kakaʦawan itiraaj i sifo~uʡan no~u ɾisɾis no~u rijar no~u sawaɾian no~u kaɾinko~u ato~u po~uso~uŋ, o~u isakaʡamisan a ətaɾ no~u po~uso~uŋ ko~uwan, isakaʡamisan maɾafijawaj ato~u fako~uŋ ətaɾ no~u kaɾinko~u, isakatimo~uɾan maɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~uaj ato~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw, misiʡajawaj to~u tajpin-jaŋ rijar, isakʡətipan maɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮ to~u ɾiɾisaj no~u rijar ɾo~uto~uk ato~u po~usko~u ato~u ko~uŋpo~u ətaɾ no~u kaɾinko~u. o~u kakaħaɬ~ɮ no~u səra ira ***.**** km*, maħao~up ko~u *.**% a səra no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u po~uso~uŋ, o~u niko~uwanan a paɾa naniʡamis taɾa timo~uɾ masaʦo~uʡəʦo~uaj a to~uʡəɬ~ɮaw, ira ko~u ** km, o~u kakaħaɬ~ɮ nani kawaɾi tajra i kaʡətip ɾatək ira ko~u * km. o~u kajakaj no~u ko~uraɬ~ɮo~ut itiraaj i ʦifo~utiŋan-ʡaɾo~u, o~uno~u kaɬ~ɮipo~uŋan a misaŋaʡan (**** miħəʦa ) ato~u misaŋaʡan i **** miħəʦa ato~u **** miħəʦa matataʡəɬ~ɮipaj nəŋəŋən. tamɬ~ɮaw ʡarawən ko~u pisaʡo~usi no~u ko~usika no~u siŋko~u, i **** miħəʦaan a paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u kakaʦawan ira k * o~ufaɬ~ɮ * patək, o~u masaʡo~usiaj tamɬ~ɮaw i ira ko~u * ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ * patək ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kakaʦawan,o~u sakakaaj ko~u kaaɬ~ɮiħaj no~u tamɬ~ɮaw o~u kakaʦawan nijaro~uʡ, o~u sasafaaj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw o~u ɬ~ɮitaʡan nijaro~uʡ , i **** miħəʦaan a saʡo~usi no~utamɬ~ɮaw o~u kakaʦawan ira ko~u *,*** tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u ɬ~ɮitaʡan ira ko~u *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. siəʦi faʦo~u no~u siəʦi o~u ko~ufa no~u kakaʦawan ko~u sakakaaj a ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kakaʦawan, pakitiniən i faʦo~u no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uwa-minko~u o~uno~u ətaɾ a nijaħ piko~uwan a ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj sako~uwan, pato~ukəɬ~ɮəɬ~ɮ ħan o~u matajaɾ to~u nipato~uro~uɬ~ɮan no~u po~uso~un-ko~uwan ato~u no~u sakakaaj -sifo~u, o~u mito~umaɬ~ɮawaj a sko~uwan o~u kinsifo~u no~u po~uso~uŋ. o~u tapaŋ no~u ko~ufa o~u nisinkiwan no~u po~uɾo~uŋ a finawɾan no~u kakaʦawan, səpat miħəʦa ko~u katajaɾan, maŋaʡaj to~u a paraɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮ ano~u pakaaɾa to~u sinkiw to~u kinaʦəʦaj.o~u ko~ufa mipatirəŋ to~u sakaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak a kajki, o~u sakakaaj misətəkaj to~u ħaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən a sako~uwan, i ɾaʡəno~u no~u tapaŋ no~u ko~ufa ira ko~u səpat a ka ato~u si, po~uɾo~uŋən pito~u ko~u ʦo~uto~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u ħatajaɾ.o~u kaɾo~umao~uʦan no~u tajpijaw no~u kakaʦaw o~u sakakaaj nisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡaj-sako~uwan no~u finawɾan,mapao~uʦo~ur ko~u tajpijaw misaŋaʡ to~u rikəʦ ato~u mito~umaɬ~ɮaw to~u tajaɾ no~u ko~ufa. səpat miħəʦa ko~u katajaɾan no~u tajpijaw, maŋaʡaj a parariɬ~ɮ ano~u pakaaɾa to~u sinkiw. o~upo~uɾo~uŋ no~u tajpijaw patipo~uaj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u sakiɾaʦ i, itiraaj i sakato~uɾo~u a ətaɾ pisinkiwan tato~uɾo~u ko~u tajpijaw, i sakato~usa ətaɾ a pisinkiwan sasəpat ko~u tajpijaw,i sakato~usa ətaɾ a pisinkiwan a ɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮafaj jinʦo~u~umin ira ko~u sasəpat, o~u kakəriɬ~ɮan ato~u saɬ~ɮama kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u pikajkian no~u tajpijaw o~una patito~uaj tajpijaw ko~u aɾamito~upaaj misinkiw. o~u tapaŋ no~u ko~ufa sakiɾaʦ no~u ətaɾ : *.ko~uraɬ~ɮo~ut nijaro~uʡ : itiraaj i ɾawaʦ no~u ʦifo~utiŋaj ʡaɾo~u * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } taħo~uŋħo~uŋ nijaro~uʡ * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } ko~uɾaɬ~ɮo~ut nijaro~uʡ * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } kaʡasimsan -ʡaɾo~u * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } mamaŋaj ʦijai *.saɬ~ɮipo~uŋan : itiraaj i ɾawaʦ no~u saɬ~ɮipo~uŋan ʡaɾo~u * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } ʦifo~utiŋaj /ro~uħam ) * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } tapo~uwaraj nijaro~uʡ * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } ʦikaɬ~ɮaan/naɬ~ɮan * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } saɬ~ɮipo~uŋan nijaro~uʡ * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } makəraħaj nijaro~uʡ *. kakaʦawaʦ nijaro~uʡ : o~u kaitiraan no~u ko~ufa,i ʦəpo~uʡ no~u kakaʦawan-ʡaɾo~u * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } ʦənʦipo~u * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } ʦiwkaŋan * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } kakaʦawan * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } tako~u~umi *.ɬ~ɮitaʡan nijaro~uʡ : itiraaj i fafaw no~u kakaʦawan-ʡaɾo~u * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } ʦo~uŋʦo~uaŋ * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } ɬ~ɮitaan * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } fafaʡəɬ~ɮaj tako~u~umi *.pakaɾaʡaʦ :itiraaj i ɾawaʦ no~u pakaɾaʡaʦ-ʡaɾo~u * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } mo~urno~us * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } pakaraʡaʦ * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } satimo~uɾan pakaraʡaʦ *.saɾinpo~u nijaro~uʡ :itiraaj i saɾawaʦan no~u saɾinpo~u-ʡaɾo~u * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } ʦənsan * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } paso~uŋan nijaro~uʡ * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } saɾinpo~u * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } kinano~uka * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } taʡəman * {\ɬ~ɮispɾajstjɾə \b~b~vo~u~uɾɾət } ʦaɾapo~uŋaj pitiɾiɬ~ɮan ko~uʦo~uŋ : po~uso~uŋ ko~uwan nipatirəŋan a ko~uʦo~uŋ no~u kakaʦawan( maəmaŋaj pitiɾiɬ~ɮan: po~uso~uŋ ko~uwan nipatirəŋan a ko~uraɬ~ɮo~ut pitiɾiɬ~ɮan po~uso~uŋ ko~uwan nipatirəŋan a saɬ~ɮipo~uŋan pitiɾiɬ~ɮan po~uso~uŋ ko~uwan nipatirəŋan a kakaʦawan pitiɾiɬ~ɮan po~uso~uŋ ko~uwan nipatirəŋan a ɬ~ɮitaʡan pitiɾiɬ~ɮan (mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ i **** miħəʦa ) po~uso~uŋ ko~uwan nipatirəŋan a pakaraʡaʦ pitiɾiɬ~ɮan po~uso~uŋ ko~uwan nipatirəŋan a saɾinpo~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan ʡariri no~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ po~uso~uŋ ko~uwan kakaʦawan ətaɾ ʡariri no~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ. kakaʦawan ira ko~u ro~uma a so~uwaɾ, o~u kakaʦawan ko~u pinəŋnəŋan to~u miɾo~uʡo~uɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. == paʦəfaɬ~ɮaj a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ==
